summary: A clip from a Fox News split-screen interview. An anchor in a dark suit appears on the left and a bearded man in a dark suit on the right, labeled in the lower-third MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY. The banner reads DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED AFTER NEARLY 10 WEEKS and later JOHNSON: DHS WILL RUN OUT OF MONEY AT END OF MONTH.

script.scene: An anchor and an interviewee appear in split screen; lower-third reads MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY.
Banner reads DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED AFTER NEARLY 10 WEEKS as the interview continues.
Banner changes to JOHNSON: DHS WILL RUN OUT OF MONEY AT END OF MONTH.

notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY; DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED AFTER NEARLY 10 WEEKS; JOHNSON: DHS WILL RUN OUT OF MONEY AT END OF MONTH
